context: Tests whether the agent applies Tailwind CSS per skill: utility-first styling, theme tokens, responsive prefixes, hover/focus states, and dark mode support.

checklist.name: Utility classes only
checklist.description: Markup uses Tailwind utility classes. No @apply used, OR at most one short @apply block for a single repeated variant. Long @apply chains or custom CSS for layout/spacing/typography fail.

checklist.name: Theme tokens not arbitrary
checklist.description: Uses theme token class names for spacing, type, radius (e.g. rounded-lg, text-sm, p-4, gray-*) rather than arbitrary values (e.g. w-[13px], text-[14px]) for standard patterns.

checklist.name: Responsive prefixes
checklist.description: At least one responsive prefix (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, or 2xl:) appears for layout, spacing, or typography.

checklist.name: Hover and focus states
checklist.description: Interactive elements (buttons or clickable areas) include at least one of: hover: class, focus: or focus-visible: class.

checklist.name: Dark mode variants
checklist.description: At least one dark: class present for background and/or text (e.g. dark:bg-gray-800, dark:text-gray-200).
